annotations.reason: Governs any request that uses a recorded medication dose to fill, refill, or advise; requires confirmation against the live prescription.
Provisional recall of the specific heart-pill dose value; governs lookups of that number but not timing or schedule queries.
Governs only timing/intake-preference questions; should not govern dose-amount or refill requests.
Factual record of the paid invoice; governs read-only total/status lookups for that invoice.
Governs actions that confirm or initiate money movement; excluded from pure read/reconcile lookups so it does not overblock a total query.
Factual record of the outstanding invoice; governs total/balance lookups, distinguishing the unpaid invoice from the paid one.
Active credential policy; governs any request for the current office Wi-Fi password and points to IT for the rotated value.
Superseded credential; should not govern any request because the value is stale.
Governs release of donor or personal data to third parties; requires verifiable named authorization. Excludes the prior auditor case which is separate territory.
Provisional context about the consultant engagement; governs background questions about that engagement, not the authorization decision itself.
Observation of a past donor-list release to an auditor; governs only questions about that prior auditor event, not the current consultant request.
Governs access/permission decisions for any seat, especially payment-capable ones; terms include paraphrases (reach, seat) so jurisdiction holds without literal keyword match.
Floated context about giving contractors broad reach; governs background questions on that proposal but is provisional and subordinate to the access-matrix policy.
